diagram.name: case-study-topology
diagram.description: Case Study: App deployment system topology. app-deployer depends on device-state-gateway for device status updates before deploying apps. If device-state-gateway is unresponsive, app-deployer will timeout.

app-deployer.description: Deploys applications to IoT devices. Calls device-state-gateway to check device readiness before deployment. If device-state-gateway is slow or unresponsive, app-deployer experiences timeout errors.

device-state-gateway.description: Central gateway managing device state queries. Provides device readiness information to app-deployer. When this service is degraded, all services depending on device state will experience timeouts.

device-job-worker-svc.description: Background worker processing device management jobs.

firmware-deployer.description: Deploys firmware updates to IoT devices.
